source: SARS - Tax Reference Number format and validation

validation_steps: Must not be a known test/dummy number (e.g., 0000000000, 9999999999)
First digit indicates taxpayer type (0, 1, or 2 for individuals)

notes.income_tax_enforcement_2026: From February 2026, SARS strictly enforces valid Income Tax numbers in e@syFile Employer. Reconciliations will be rejected if any employee lacks a valid tax reference.
notes.blocking_rule: ZenoHR must block payroll finalization and SARS submission if any employee in the payroll run has an invalid or missing tax reference (CTL-SARS-006)

paye_reference_number.description: Employer's PAYE reference number used for EMP201/EMP501 submissions
paye_reference_number.notes: Issued by SARS when employer registers for PAYE. Required on all employer submissions.

uif_reference_number.description: Separate from PAYE reference. Required for UIF contribution reporting.

sdl_reference_number.format: Same as PAYE reference in most cases
sdl_reference_number.description: SDL is reported under the employer's PAYE reference number.
